example.title: Replacing one subsection
example.summary: A minimal amendment replaces one subsection in a small document tree.

source_witnesses.source_text: Section 4(2) is replaced by the following: "(2) A vessel entering the harbor must carry a working radio."
source_witnesses.authority_note: Minimal English fixture for the replay debugger.

phase_steps.title: Source witness
phase_steps.short_explanation: LawVM starts from an amendment instruction, not from an already-clean consolidated text.

phase_steps.title: Clause parse
phase_steps.short_explanation: The operative clause is parsed as a replace instruction with a written target and a payload reference.

phase_steps.title: Payload extraction
phase_steps.short_explanation: The quoted replacement text is extracted as a subsection payload before replay sees it.

phase_steps.title: Target resolution
phase_steps.short_explanation: The written target Section 4(2) resolves to exactly one live tree path.

phase_steps.title: Typed operation
phase_steps.short_explanation: The parsed source becomes a canonical REPLACE operation with source, payload, target, and date links.

phase_steps.title: Replay mutation
phase_steps.short_explanation: Replay mutates only the target subsection. Sibling provisions remain unchanged.

phase_steps.title: Timeline and PIT
phase_steps.short_explanation: The mutation becomes a time-indexed entry that can be materialized at a point in time.

phase_steps.title: Evidence and limits
phase_steps.short_explanation: The result is shown with provenance, strict/quirks status, and the boundary of what this fixture demonstrates.

units.text_en: A vessel entering the harbor must carry a working radio.

children.text: The harbor master may publish safety notices.
A vessel must request permission before entering the harbor.
A vessel entering after sunset must carry a signal lamp.
The harbor master may deny entry during severe weather.
The harbor master may publish safety notices.
A vessel must request permission before entering the harbor.
A vessel entering the harbor must carry a working radio.
The harbor master may deny entry during severe weather.

candidate_paths.reason: Exact section and subsection labels exist in the live tree.

strictness.reason: No recovery or fallback target resolution is required in this curated fixture.

pit_queries.materialized_text: A vessel entering the harbor must carry a working radio.

observations.detail: The written target names Section 4(2), and the live tree contains that exact section/subsection path.
Replay replaced the targeted subsection only. No sibling paths changed.

oracle_comparisons.detail: For this curated fixture, replay and the expected after-tree agree at the target path.

outward_claims.text: The displayed after-state follows from the typed replace operation in this curated fixture.

notices.text: Minimal English amendment fixture for showing source, parse, payload, target, operation, replay, timeline, and evidence.
The point is compiler mechanics: text-state derivation, mutation boundaries, and evidence links.

phase_copy.source: The source panel highlights the operative clause and the payload separately.
phase_copy.parse: The parse keeps the action family as replace; it is not downgraded into insert.
phase_copy.payload: Payload extraction owns the quoted replacement text without importing unrelated siblings.
phase_copy.target: Target resolution is explicit-source confidence, not fallback guessing.
phase_copy.op: The operation card is the execution contract replay consumes.
phase_copy.replay: The changed path is inside the operation target region.
phase_copy.timeline: Point-in-time text is derived from operation history.
phase_copy.evidence: The evidence panel shows what this curated example proves and does not prove.
